title: San Diego next Saturday with KP
excerpt: Collaborating with creative friends is one of my favorite things. Kelly Purkey and I will be in San Diego again teaching a day of workshops on November 17th and would love to have you join in on the fun. We…
body:
Collaborating with creative friends is one of my favorite things. Kelly Purkey and I will be in San Diego again teaching a day of workshops on November 17th and would love to have you join in on the fun. We had a blast in the spring and have some neat stuff planned in Paper Tales' expanded space, including exclusive prints & a washi tape bar! It's self-serve, the kind where you walk up and get to play with all kinds of colorful tapes. Woohoo.

All details and sign up information on right here. PS- KP has her gorgeous December Daily kits restocked for pre-order! I just adore the exclusive cards by Sarah Champion and Jamaica (also creative folks I am lucky to call friends) and this perfect holiday stamp set.
